Container.Name: mutsuki-kavita-mal-bridge
Container.Overview: Mutsuki Kavita MAL Bridge polls Kavita as the progress source of truth, maps Kavita series to MyAnimeList, and queues monotonic MAL progress updates through SQLite. Keep dry-run enabled until mappings and outbox updates look correct.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the bridge Web UI. Container port is 6768.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent bridge storage for SQLite, OAuth tokens, mappings, outbox, and audit logs.

Config.Name: Internal Port
Config.Description: Internal HTTP port used by the bridge process. Keep this at 6768 unless you also change the port mapping.

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container.

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: When true, planned MAL writes are previewed and left pending instead of being pushed.

Config.Name: Poll Interval Seconds
Config.Description: Scheduled Kavita-to-MAL sync interval in seconds. Minimum is 60.

Config.Name: Max MAL Searches Per Run
Config.Description: Maximum new MAL title-search requests per sync run. Existing review-queue entries are skipped until resolved.

Config.Name: Enable Jikan Resolver
Config.Description: Use Jikan as read-only candidate discovery when official MAL text search misses a title. Candidates are still validated through official MAL direct lookup.

Config.Name: Enable AniList Resolver
Config.Description: Use public AniList GraphQL search to discover MAL IDs through idMal. Candidates are still validated through official MAL direct lookup.

Config.Name: Resolver Timeout MS
Config.Description: Timeout for external discovery helpers. Resolver failures do not block deterministic IDs or existing mappings.

Config.Name: Resolver Cache TTL Hours
Config.Description: How long Jikan/AniList discovery responses remain cached in SQLite.

Config.Name: Resolver Candidates Per Query
Config.Description: Maximum discovery candidates per title variant before official MAL direct-ID validation.

Config.Name: Resolver User Agent
Config.Description: User-Agent header for public discovery APIs.

Config.Name: Kavita Base URL
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap Kavita URL. This can also be saved in the bridge Web UI.

Config.Name: Kavita API Key
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap Kavita API/Auth key. This can also be saved in the bridge Web UI.

Config.Name: MAL Client ID
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap MyAnimeList OAuth client ID. This can also be saved in the bridge Web UI.

Config.Name: MAL Client Secret
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap MyAnimeList OAuth client secret. This can also be saved in the bridge Web UI.

Config.Name: MAL Redirect URI
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap MAL redirect URI, for example http://192.168.50.138:6768/api/mal/oauth/callback.

Config.Name: MAL Access Token
Config.Description: Optional legacy direct MAL token. OAuth through the bridge Web UI is preferred.
